messages.content:
制造业企业数字化转型动因、策略与效果分析
——以金风科技为例
如何用学术语言翻译
"Analysis of the Motivation, Strategies and Effects of Digital Transformation in Manufacturing Enterprises: A Case Study of Goldwind Technology"
Digital transformation  has become an important engine for the transformation and development of the manufacturing industry. 改写这句话 维持原本意思不变
The manufacturing industry is experiencing a transformation and development driven by digital transformation as a crucial factor.
Digital transformation has emerged as a key engine driving the transformation and development of the manufacturing industry.

Huang C, Pan W, Ma X, et al. Using reconfigurable transmitarray to achieve beam-steering and polarization manipulation applications[J]. IEEE Transactions on Antennas and Propagation, 2015, 63(11): 4801-4810. 翻译一下
黄超，潘巍，马旭，等人。使用可重构传输阵列实现波束控制和极化调控应用。《IEEE天线和传播学报》，2015，63（11）：4801-4810。
Bernhard Thies（2018）从全球化与规范化视角将企业数字化转型的三个重要维度归纳为商业模式变革、流程价值链升级与产品和服务的数字化更新     翻译

Bernhard Thies (2018) summarizes the three important dimensions of digital transformation in enterprises from the perspectives of globalization and standardization as changes in business models, upgrades in process value chains, and digital updates of products and services.
Servitization and Industry 4.0 convergence in the digital transformation of product firms: A business model innovation perspective[J]. Technological Forecasting and Social Change,  翻译
"基于商业模式创新的产品企业数字化转型中的服务化和工业4.0融合：一个预测技术与社会变革的视角" (来源期刊: Technological Forecasting and Social Change)

数字化转型作为一项契合新时代技术发展方向的新应变，有着巨大的发展前景，已成为制造业企业转型发展的重要引擎。本文采用文献研究、案例研究与对比分析相结合的研究方法，通过梳理国内外有关企业数字化转型的文献，结合金风科技数字化转型的实际案例，对制造业企业数字化转型的动因做出分析，并按照企业数字化与业务产业链数字化两个模块阐述制造业企业数字化转型策略，同时基于财务与非财务指标对其转型效果做出评价。 用学术语言翻译这段话

This study adopts a combination of literature review, case study, and comparative analysis methods to explore the huge development prospects and important role of digital transformation in the transformation and development of manufacturing enterprises as a novel adaptive response to the direction of technological development in the new era. By reviewing relevant literature on enterprise digital transformation and combining it with the practical case of digital transformation in Goldwind Technology, this study analyzes the motivation behind digital transformation in manufacturing enterprises. Furthermore, this study elaborates on digital transformation strategies in two modules, namely, enterprise digitalization and business industrial-chain digitalization, and evaluates the transformation effects based on financial and non-financial indicators.
该段文字将用作学术论文的摘要，保持原意不变，尽量减少同一句话中的重复，进行修改

In response to the direction of technological development in the new era, digital transformation has emerged as a promising adaptive response and an important engine driving the transformation and development of manufacturing enterprises. This study employed a combination of literature review, case study, and comparative analysis methods to investigate the motivation behind digital transformation in manufacturing enterprises. By analyzing relevant literature and the practical case of digital transformation in Goldwind Technology, this study proposed digital transformation strategies in two modules, namely, enterprise digitalization and business industrial-chain digitalization. The transformation effects are evaluated based on financial and non-financial indicators.
制造业；数字化转型；金风科技；动因；效果  用学术语言对这些词语做翻译

- 制造业：Manufacturing industry
- 数字化转型：Digital transformation
- 金风科技：Goldwind Technology
- 动因：Motivation/factors
- 效果：Effects/outcomes
